items.name: CA Foundation Paper 1 Accounting Guide
items.description: FA's definitive accounting guide for Paper 1. Covers principles, journal entries, final accounts and more — with solved examples throughout.

items.name: CA Foundation Paper 2 Business Laws
items.description: Comprehensive coverage of business law, corporate regulations and correspondence. Updated for the latest ICAI syllabus with case-based examples.

items.name: CA Foundation Paper 3 Maths & Stats
items.description: Step-by-step coverage of business mathematics, logical reasoning and statistics. Clear explanations, structured exercises and rapid revision sections.

items.name: CA Foundation Paper 4 Economics
items.description: Business economics and commercial knowledge for Paper 4 — micro and macro concepts explained with real-world examples and exam-ready summaries.

items.name: Full Question Bank Vol. 1
items.description: Over 5,000 carefully curated questions covering Papers 1 and 2 — categorised by topic, difficulty and exam-relevance. The foundation of FA's winning record.

items.name: Full Question Bank Vol. 2
items.description: 5,000+ questions for Papers 3 and 4 — including past exam questions, practice problems and mock test sets. Updated for the current exam cycle.

items.name: CA Foundation Complete Study Kit
items.description: The complete FA package — all four paper guides, both question bank volumes and a revision planner in a single kit. Everything you need to clear CA Foundation.

items.name: Revision Flashcard Set
items.description: 250 double-sided flashcards covering key definitions, formulae, legal provisions and economic concepts from all four CA Foundation papers.
